name: Ben & Jerry's Kiwi Ice Cream
recipeInstructions: Kiwi Ice Cream is one of Ben and Jerry's more exotic, subtle flavors for the true connoisseur. Peel the kiwis and mash them in a bowl until pureed. Stir 2 tablespoons sugar into the fruit, cover, and refrigerate for 1 hour. Whisk the eggs in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy, about 1-2 minutes. Whisk in 1 cup sugar gradually, then continue whisking until completely blended, approximately 1 more minute. Pour in the cream and whisk to blend. Stir in the kiwis. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze following manufacturer's instructions. Makes 1 quart.
